roles.description: Manage all aspects of agents in a tenant including identity lifecycle operations for agent blueprints, agent identity blueprint principals, agent identities, and agentic users.

Create an agent identity blueprint and its agent identity blueprint principal in a tenant. User will be added as an owner of the created agent identity blueprint and its agent identity blueprint principal.
Manage all aspects of the Agent Registry service in Microsoft Entra ID
Manage all aspects of Microsoft 365 Copilot and AI-related enterprise services in Microsoft 365.
Read all aspects of Microsoft 365 Copilot and AI-related enterprise services in Microsoft 365.
roles.note: Read-only role, but Microsoft Graph isPrivileged = Yes. AI Reader can read Copilot/AI configuration data that Microsoft treats as sensitive. The Privileged classification follows the only authoritative per-role flag (isPrivileged). If your organization classifies this lower, document the deviation and perform a risk assessment.

roles.description: Can create and manage all aspects of app registrations and enterprise apps.
Can create application registrations independent of the 'Users can register applications' setting.
Can create attack payloads that an administrator can initiate later.
Can create and manage all aspects of attack simulation campaigns.
Assign custom security attribute keys and values to supported Microsoft Entra objects.
Read custom security attribute keys and values for supported Microsoft Entra objects.
Define and manage the definition of custom security attributes.
Read the definition of custom security attributes.
Read audit logs and configure diagnostic settings for events related to custom security attributes.
Read audit logs related to custom security attributes.
Read and edit the provisioning configuration of all active custom security attributes for an application.
Read the provisioning configuration of all active custom security attributes for an application.
roles.note: Read-only role, but isPrivileged = Yes. Reads the provisioning configuration of all active custom security attributes for applications. Custom security attributes drive access control, so visibility into them reveals the authorization structure to an attacker. Privileged classification follows the isPrivileged flag.

roles.description: Can access to view, set and reset authentication method information for any non-admin user.
Customize sign in and sign up experiences for users by creating and managing custom authentication extensions.
Trigger a password submit event for custom authentication.
Can create and manage the authentication methods policy, tenant-wide MFA settings, password protection policy, and verifiable credentials.

roles.displayName: Azure AD Joined Device Local Administrator
roles.description: Users assigned to this role are added to the local administrators group on Microsoft Entra joined devices.
Can manage Azure DevOps organization policy and settings.
roles.note: Blast-radius escape clause applied. isPrivileged = No, but full control over Azure DevOps organizations (source code, pipelines, secrets, deployment agents). Supply-chain risk: pipeline tampering can affect production deployments. Verify scope in your tenant.

roles.description: Can manage all aspects of the Azure Information Protection product.
Can manage secrets for federation and encryption in the Identity Experience Framework (IEF).
Can create and manage trust framework policies in the Identity Experience Framework (IEF).
Can perform common billing related tasks like updating payment information.
Can manage all aspects of the Cloud App Security product.
Can create and manage all aspects of app registrations and enterprise apps except App Proxy.
Limited access to manage devices in Microsoft Entra ID.
Can read and manage compliance configuration and reports in Microsoft Entra ID and Microsoft 365.
Creates and manages compliance content.
Can manage Conditional Access capabilities.
Manage all aspects of granular delegated admin privileges (GDAP) relationships in a customer tenant.
roles.note: MSP relevance: manages GDAP (Granular Delegated Admin Privileges) relationships that grant external partners/MSPs access to customer tenants. isPrivileged = No, so Enterprise is technically correct per the three rules; consider manually raising to Specialized if your organization actively manages GDAP for external access.

roles.description: Can approve Microsoft support requests to access customer organizational data.
Can access and manage Desktop management tools and services.
Deprecated - Do Not Use.
Deprecated - Do Not Use.
Deprecated - Do Not Use.
Can read basic directory information. Commonly used to grant directory read access to applications and guests.
Only used by Microsoft Entra Connect service.
roles.note: Service-account-only role for Microsoft Entra Connect. No human should hold this role directly. Any human members are a finding priority.

roles.description: Can read and write basic directory information. For granting access to applications, not intended for users.
Can manage domain names in cloud and on-premises.
Manage all aspects of the Microsoft Dragon admin center.
Can manage all aspects of the Dynamics 365 product.
roles.note: Blast-radius escape clause applied. isPrivileged = No, but full control over Dynamics 365 (CRM/ERP data, customer data, financial data). Verify scope in your tenant.

roles.description: Access and perform all administrative tasks on Dynamics 365 Business Central environments.
Manage all aspects of Microsoft Edge.
Manage all aspects of Microsoft Entra Backup, such as create recovery jobs and manage backup snapshots.
Read all aspects of Microsoft Entra Backup, such as list all preview jobs, recovery jobs, backup snapshots, and create preview jobs.
Can approve customer lockbox requests for accessing customer data in Entra ID.
Can manage all aspects of the Exchange product.
roles.note: Blast-radius escape clause applied. isPrivileged = No, but full access to all mailboxes (including executives) justifies the Privileged regime. Exchange Admin can read all mailbox content, set rules, manipulate transport, and reach password resets indirectly via mail. Verify scope in your tenant.

roles.description: Back up and restore content (including granular restore) for Exchange in Microsoft 365 Backup
Can create or update Exchange Online recipients within the Exchange Online organization.
Manage all aspects of external user profiles in the extended directory for Teams.
Can create and manage all aspects of user flows.

roles.displayName: External ID User Flow Attribute Administrator
roles.description: Can create and manage the attribute schema available to all user flows.
Can configure identity providers for use in direct federation.
Manages all aspects of Microsoft Fabric.
roles.note: Blast-radius escape clause applied. isPrivileged = No, but full control over Microsoft Fabric (data warehouse, lakehouse, BI data, Spark workloads). Verify scope in your tenant.

roles.description: Can manage all aspects of Microsoft Entra ID and Microsoft services that use Microsoft Entra identities.
roles.note: Highest priority for PIM migration. If any standing (permanent) assignments exist, treat them as a finding. A long activation window without approval means a stolen token grants full tenant control for that duration.

roles.description: Can read everything that a Global Administrator can, but not update anything.
roles.note: Read-only role, but isPrivileged = Yes. Global Reader can view everything a Global Administrator can, including all Conditional Access policies, PIM settings, security configuration and federation settings. Full visibility into the security architecture gives an attacker a tactical advantage even without write access. Privileged classification is defensible; if you choose Specialized, document the risk acceptance.

roles.description: Create and manage all aspects of Global Secure Internet Access and Microsoft Global Secure Private Access, including managing access to public and private endpoints.
Provides designated security personnel with read-only access to network traffic logs in Microsoft Entra Internet Access and Microsoft Entra Private Access for detailed analysis.
Members of this role can create/manage groups, create/manage groups settings like naming and expiration policies, and view groups activity and audit reports.
Can invite guest users independent of the 'members can invite guests' setting.
Default role for guest users. Can read a limited set of directory information.
Can reset passwords for non-administrators and Helpdesk Administrators.
Can manage Active Directory to Microsoft Entra cloud provisioning, Microsoft Entra Connect, and federation settings.
Manage access using Microsoft Entra ID for identity governance scenarios.
Has administrative access in the Microsoft 365 Insights app.
Access the analytical capabilities in Microsoft Viva Insights and run custom queries.
Can view and share dashboards and insights via the M365 Insights app.
Can manage all aspects of the Intune product.
roles.note: Privileged via isPrivileged = Yes. Note the trend toward treating Intune Administrator as Control Plane (compliance signals feed the Conditional Access loop, and scripts can run on all endpoints). Consider multi-admin approval for destructive actions (wipe, retire, script deployment).

roles.description: Provision new IoT devices, manage their lifecycle, configure certificates, and manage device templates.
Can manage settings for Microsoft Kaizala.
Can configure knowledge, learning, and other intelligent features.
roles.note: Blast-radius escape clause applied. isPrivileged = No, but full control over knowledge management (Topics, Viva Topics). Impact is relatively limited versus Exchange/SharePoint; verify scope in your tenant.

roles.description: Has access to topic management dashboard and can manage content.
roles.note: Blast-radius escape clause applied (management role, not admin). Has access to topic management and content. Verify scope in your tenant; consider whether Specialized is sufficient given the narrower scope versus Knowledge Administrator.

roles.description: Can manage product licenses on users and groups.
Create and manage all aspects of workflows and tasks associated with Lifecycle Workflows in Microsoft Entra ID.
Can read security messages and updates in Office 365 Message Center only.
Can read messages and updates for their organization in Office 365 Message Center only.

Perform all migration functionality to migrate content to Microsoft 365 using Migration Manager.

Can manage Office apps cloud services, including policy and settings management, and manage the ability to select, unselect and publish 'what's new' feature content to end-user's devices.
Only used by Microsoft Entra Connect Sync Account.
roles.note: Service-account-only role for Microsoft Entra Connect Sync. Identical to Directory Synchronization Accounts: no human should hold this role.

roles.description: Manage all aspects of organizational branding in a tenant.
Set up and manage the ingestion of organizational data into Microsoft 365.
Review, approve, or reject new organizational messages for delivery in the Microsoft 365 admin center before they are sent to users.
Write, publish, manage, and review the organizational messages for end-users through Microsoft product surfaces.
Do not use - not intended for general use.
roles.note: Microsoft-internal use. Description: "Do not use - not intended for general use." No customer organization should have assignments here. Any assignment is a finding priority.

roles.description: Do not use - not intended for general use.
roles.note: Microsoft-internal use. Description: "Do not use - not intended for general use." Higher privilege than Tier1. Any assignment is a critical finding: remove immediately.

roles.description: Can reset passwords for non-administrators and Password Administrators.
Manage profile photos of users and people settings for all users in the organization.
Manage all aspects of Entra Permissions Management.
roles.note: Scope consideration: manages cross-cloud permissions via Microsoft Entra Permissions Management (CIEM). isPrivileged = No, so Enterprise per the three rules. However, it provides visibility and control over all cloud privilege paths (Azure, AWS, GCP). If you actively use Permissions Management, consider raising to Specialized.

roles.description: Manage all aspects of the Microsoft Places service.
Can create and manage all aspects of Microsoft Dynamics 365, PowerApps and Microsoft Flow.
roles.note: Blast-radius escape clause applied. isPrivileged = No, but full control over Power Platform environments (Power Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse), including automated connections to external systems and data-exfiltration risk. Verify scope in your tenant.

Can manage role assignments in Microsoft Entra ID, and all aspects of Privileged Identity Management.

Read data from Microsoft 365 when accessing from the Microsoft Purview portal.
Read and edit data from Microsoft 365 when accessing from the Microsoft Purview portal.

Restricted role for guest users. Can read a limited set of directory information.
Can create and manage all aspects of Microsoft Search settings.
Can create and manage the editorial content such as bookmarks, Q and As, locations, floorplan.
Can read security information and reports, and manage configuration in Microsoft Entra ID and Office 365.
Creates and manages security events.
roles.note: Security Operator can create and manage security events. isPrivileged = Yes, so Privileged. Difference from Security Reader: Operator has write access to security events, which can disrupt detection.

roles.description: Can read security information and reports in Microsoft Entra ID and Office 365.
roles.note: Read-only role, but isPrivileged = Yes. Security Reader can view security configuration, alerts and reports across Entra ID and Microsoft 365. Visibility into the security architecture reveals detection gaps to an attacker. Privileged classification follows the isPrivileged flag. Same argument as Global Reader: read-only does not mean no impact.

roles.description: Can read service health information and manage support tickets.
Can manage all aspects of the SharePoint service.
roles.note: Blast-radius escape clause applied. isPrivileged = No, but full access to all SharePoint sites and OneDrive content (including sensitive documents) justifies the Privileged regime. SharePoint Admin can change site security and read every user's files. Verify scope in your tenant.

Read everything in the Teams admin center, but not update anything.

Create new Microsoft Entra or Azure AD B2C tenants.
roles.note: Can create new Entra or Azure AD B2C tenants. isPrivileged = No, so Enterprise per the rules. Impact: a new tenant is a new attack surface. Consider Specialized, or block tenant creation via Entra tenant-creation settings (independent of PIM).
